name: unicode_a7dc_enum_nested_list
description: Nested surface: enum ƛ|other inside a list<enum>. Input ["Ƛ","other"] folds U+A7DC→U+019B for the first element, claiming [ƛ, other] — the per-element fold is native's to claim. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
